calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Off Calendar

Mtn For Default Prove-Up Hrg; Brief
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Susan Crozier, #4761.

Barbara K. Mizuno, Esq. appeared for plaintiff AAA Northern California, Nevada & Utah Insurance Exchange, a reciprocal inter-insurance exchange.
Defendant Justin A. Pugh was present but was not permitted to participate in today's proceedings.
Default was entered against defendant on October 24, 2011.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 12, 2012.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff AAA Northern California, Nevada & Utah Insurance Exchange, a reciprocal inter-insurance exchange, and against the Defaulted Defendant Justin A. Pugh as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,549.16.
Costs - $415.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $16,964.16.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
